atDirectives.name: @import
atDirectives.description: Used to import Tailwind CSS or other stylesheets, e.g. @import 'tailwindcss';

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: defines design tokens (colors, fonts, spacing, etc.) as CSS custom properties.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: defines a custom variant, e.g. @custom-variant dark (&:is(.dark *));

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Inlines existing utility classes into a custom CSS rule.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Tells Tailwind which 'bucket' a set of custom styles belong to (base, components, utilities).

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: applies a variant to a rule inside a CSS file.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS: specifies the path to a custom Tailwind config file.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: loads a Tailwind plugin from within CSS.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: explicitly registers additional source files for class scanning.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: defines a custom utility class.
